Body.Content:
The new content composition experience makes it easier and faster to share in Viva Engage with a cleaner, more intuitive publishing experience. It brings clearer layout, better accessibility, and smarter organization of tools—so you can focus on creating great posts without extra clicks or clutter.

GA date: May CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Viva: Modernized content composition experience in Engage

Body.Content:
In Viva Engage, we've simplified how to create posts. The new post creation experience makes it easier and faster to share in Viva Engage with a cleaner, more intuitive publishing experience. It brings clearer layout, better accessibility, and smarter organization of tools—so you can focus on creating great posts without extra clicks or clutter.

GA date: May CY2026
